title: Anvixo's Bits
description: Adds More Endgame Content, Designed to Extend SMP Lifespan  / 2 Week Phases!
body:
# BE SURE TO DOWNLOAD THE RESOURCE PACK!
## This Datapack is made mainly for an SMP, and is playtested by it's members!
### So, What is this?
Anvixo's Bits aims to add a TON more things to do, and also very lightly modifies certain aspects of Vanilla for a better experience!! :D

From new **Structures, Advancements and Enchantments**, to silly Items and other additions for the *Tryhards* of the SMP! :0

You can contact me via @anvixo on Discord!

## A Full [Feature List](https://ltsmp.miraheze.org/wiki/Feature_List) of the Latest Version
